## --- Environment Setup ---
library(aod)      
library(dplyr)    
library(plyr)     
library(ggplot2)  
library(eoffice)  

## Figure 6A-C. Neutral Community modeling of typical ecological processes between mucosal and luminal compartments in GI organs
map  <- read.table("data/metadata_filtered.tsv", header = T, sep = "\t", row.names = 1)
otu <- read.table(data/fig6/otu_filtered_rare.tsv", header=T,sep="\t",stringsAsFactors=F,row.names=1)
source("script/neutral_model.R")
source("script/nmf_plot.R")
model.add <- function(model.fit) {
        for (i in 1:nrow(model.fit)) {
                m <- model.fit[i,]
                if (m$freq > m$pred.lwr & m$freq < m$pred.upr) {
                        model.fit$tax_type[i] <- "Predicted"
                } else if (m$freq >= m$pred.upr) {
                        model.fit$tax_type[i] <- "Above"
                } else {
                        model.fit$tax_type[i] <- "Below"
                }
        }
        return(model.fit)
}

SA_mucosa <- otu[rownames(mapping[mapping$BS %in% "Stomach" & mapping$sampletype %in% "M",]),]
SA_lumen <- otu[rownames(mapping[mapping$BS %in% "Stomach" & !mapping$sampletype %in% "M",]),]
SI_mucosa <- otu[rownames(mapping[mapping$BS %in% "SmallIntestine" & mapping$sampletype %in% "M",]),]
SI_lumen <- otu[rownames(mapping[mapping$BS %in% "SmallIntestine" & !mapping$sampletype %in% "M",]),]
LI_mucosa <- otu[rownames(mapping[mapping$BS %in% "LargeIntestine" & mapping$sampletype %in% "M",]),]
LI_lumen <- otu[rownames(mapping[mapping$BS %in% "LargeIntestine" & mapping$site != "ANAL" & !mapping$sampletype %in% "M",]),]

# NMF modeling of stochastic process
TM <- list(SA_mucosa,SA_lumen,SI_mucosa,SI_lumen,LI_mucosa,LI_lumen)
fn <- c("SAM","SAL","SIM","SIL","LIM","LIL")
model_para <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(TM)) {
        region <- fn[i]
        sink <- TM[[i]]
        model.stat <- sncm.fit(sink,stats=TRUE)
        model.fit <- sncm.fit(sink,stats=FALSE)
        model.pred <- model.add(model.fit)
        temp <- data.frame(organ=region,
                           R2=round(model.stat$Rsqr,5),
                           m=round(model.stat$m,5),
                           pval=model.stat$m.pval,
                           AIC=round(model.stat$AIC,5),
                           AIC.bino=round(model.stat$AIC.bino,5),
                           N.otu=model.stat$Richness,
                           N.above=as.matrix(table(model.pred$tax_type))[1],
                           N.below=as.matrix(table(model.pred$tax_type))[2],
                           N.pred=as.matrix(table(model.pred$tax_type))[3])
        model_para <- rbind(model_para,temp)
        myplot <- nmf_plot(model.fit,model.stat)
        figname <- paste(region,"_stochastic.pdf",sep="")
        pdf(figname,height=3,width=3.6)
        print(myplot)
        dev.off()
}

# NMF modeling of transmission process between mucosal and lumen comopartments
L1 <- list(SA_mucosa,SI_mucosa,LI_mucosa)
L2 <- list(SA_lumen,SI_lumen,LI_lumen)
fnA <- c("SA-L2M","SI-L2M","LI-L2M")
transmission_para <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(L1)) {
        route <- fnA[i]
        sink <- L1[[i]]
        souc <- L2[[i]]
        model.stat <- sncm.fit(sink,pool=souc,stats=TRUE)
        model.fit <- sncm.fit(sink,pool=souc,stats=FALSE)
        model.pred <- model.add(model.fit)
        temp <- data.frame(transmission=route,
                           R2=round(model.stat$Rsqr,5),
                           m=round(model.stat$m,5),
                           pval=model.stat$m.pval,
                           AIC=round(model.stat$AIC,5),
                           AIC.bino=round(model.stat$AIC.bino,5),
                           N.otu=model.stat$Richness,
                           N.above=as.matrix(table(model.pred$tax_type))[1],
                           N.below=as.matrix(table(model.pred$tax_type))[2],
                           N.pred=as.matrix(table(model.pred$tax_type))[3])
        transmission_para <- rbind(transmission_para,temp)
        myplot <- nmf_plot(model.fit,model.stat)
        figname <- paste(route,"_transmission.pdf",sep="")
        pdf(figname,height=3,width=3.6)
        print(myplot)
        dev.off()
}

## Figure 6D-E. Transmission of fungal taxa between mucosal and luminal sites in GI organs at OTU level
# Load Global Data
data <- read.table("data/fig6/otu_filtered.tsv", header = T, sep = "\t", row.names = 1, check.names = F)
map  <- read.table("data/metadata_filtered.tsv", header = T, sep = "\t", row.names = 1)
tax  <- read.table("data/fig6/tax_9840_ano.txt", header = T, sep = "\t")
rownames(tax) <- tax$OTU

## --- Define the Beta-Binomial Summary Function ---
fm_summary <- function(data, map, site1, site2) {
  # Subset metadata for the specific comparison
  rowmap <- map[map$subsite %in% c(site1, site2), ]
  name   <- intersect(rownames(rowmap), colnames(data))  
  if (length(name) == 0) return(NULL)
  use_data <- data[, name]
  rowmap   <- rowmap[name, ]
  use_data <- use_data[rowSums(use_data) != 0, ]
 
  # Assign simplified types for the model
  rowmap$type <- ifelse(rowmap$subsite == site1, "a", "b")
  sumvalue    <- colSums(use_data)
  result <- data.frame()
  current_site_label <- paste(unique(rowmap$site), collapse = "_")
  
  # Iterate through each Taxon
  for (i in 1:nrow(use_data)) {
    taxon_name <- rownames(use_data)[i]
    # Build model data frame
    use_df <- data.frame(
      y       = as.numeric(use_data[i, ]),
      type    = rowmap$type,
      subject = rowmap$subject,
      n       = sumvalue
    )   
    # Fit Beta-Binomial Model
    # formula: cbind(success, failure) ~ predictors
    try({
      fm      <- betabin(cbind(y, n - y) ~ type + subject, ~ 1, data = use_df)
      fm_sum  <- summary(fm)
      
      # Extract Beta (Effect Size) and P-value for the 'type' variable
      beta_val <- fm_sum@Coef$Estimate[2]
      p_val    <- fm_sum@Coef$`Pr(> |z|)`[2]
      
      result <- rbind(result, data.frame(
        Tax       = taxon_name,
        betavalue = as.numeric(beta_val),
        pvalue    = as.numeric(p_val),
        Site      = current_site_label
      ))
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
  if (nrow(result) == 0) return(NULL)
  # FDR Correction and filtering
  result$qvalue <- p.adjust(result$pvalue, method = "fdr")
  return(result[!is.na(result$pvalue) & result$pvalue < 0.05, ])
}

## --- Main Processing Loop ---
bs_list <- c("Stomach", "SmallIntestine", "LargeIntestine")
for (name in bs_list) {
  message(">>> Processing Body Site: ", name)
  result_all <- data.frame()
  use_map <- map[map$BS == name, ]
  # --- Comparison Logic ---
  if (name == "Stomach") {
    mucosa_site <- unique(use_map$subsite[use_map$pair_grp == "stomach_mucosa"])
    lumen_site  <- unique(use_map$subsite[use_map$pair_grp == "stomach_lumen"])
    for (m in mucosa_site) {
      temp <- fm_summary(data, map, m, lumen_site)
      result_all <- rbind(result_all, temp)
    }
  } else {
    # Logic for SI and LI: Match by parent 'site'
    mucosa_sites <- unique(use_map$site[grepl("mucosa", use_map$pair_grp)])
    lumen_sites  <- unique(use_map$site[grepl("lumen", use_map$pair_grp)])
    common_sites <- intersect(mucosa_sites, lumen_sites)
    for (s in common_sites) {
      sub_samples <- use_map[use_map$site == s, ]
      a <- unique(sub_samples$subsite[grepl("mucosa", sub_samples$pair_grp)])
      b <- unique(sub_samples$subsite[grepl("lumen", sub_samples$pair_grp)])
      if (length(a) > 0 && length(b) > 0) {
        temp <- fm_summary(data, map, a, b)
        result_all <- rbind(result_all, temp)
      }
    }
  }
  
  if (nrow(result_all) == 0) next
  
  # --- Consistency Filtering ---
  # Keep Taxa that are consistently Positive OR consistently Negative across sites
  consistency_list <- result_all %>%
    group_by(Tax) %>%
    summarise(
      Pos = sum(betavalue > 0),
      Neg = sum(betavalue < 0)
    ) %>%
    filter((Pos > 0 & Neg == 0) | (Pos == 0 & Neg > 0))
  
  figdata <- result_all[result_all$Tax %in% consistency_list$Tax, ]
  
  # --- Visualization Preparation ---
  # Calculate Mean Beta for sorting
  df_mean <- figdata %>%
    group_by(Tax) %>%
    summarise(mean_beta = mean(betavalue)) %>%
    arrange(mean_beta)
  
  # Order Factors
  figdata$Tax <- factor(figdata$Tax, levels = df_mean$Tax)
  
  # Taxonomy and Color Mapping
  use_tax_info <- tax[as.character(df_mean$Tax), ]
  # (Note: Ensure your phylum_color.txt and phylum_tax.txt are correctly formatted)
  
  # --- Generate Final Plot ---
  p <- ggplot(figdata, aes(x = betavalue, y = Tax)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    # Individual site results
    geom_point(aes(fill = Site), shape = 21, size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
    # Mean indicator (vertical bar)
    geom_point(data = df_mean, aes(x = mean_beta, y = Tax), shape = "|", size = 3, color = "black") +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") + # Generic palette, swap with scale_fill_manual if needed
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7), # You can map colors here if use_tax_info$color exists
      axis.title = element_text(size = 10)
    ) +
    labs(title = paste(name, ": Mucosa vs Lumen (Beta-Binomial)"), x = "Beta Value", y = "")
}
